cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.28.3.0)
set(CMAKE_MODULE_PATH "/home/autoptr/Proyects/GeometrySurvivor/_deps/sdl2-src/cmake")
cmake_policy(SET CMP0126 OLD)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0128 OLD)
project(CMAKE_TRY_COMPILE C)
set(CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE 1)
set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS " -idirafter \"/home/autoptr/Proyects/GeometrySurvivor/_deps/sdl2-src/src/video/khronos\"")
set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS "${CMAKE_C_FLAGS} ${COMPILE_DEFINITIONS}")
set(CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS "")
set(CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS "${CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS} ${EXE_LINKER_FLAGS}")
include_directories(${INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES})
set(CMAKE_SUPPRESS_REGENERATION 1)
link_directories(${LINK_DIRECTORIES})
cmake_policy(SET CMP0065 NEW)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0083 OLD)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0155 OLD)
include("${CMAKE_ROOT}/Modules/Internal/HeaderpadWorkaround.cmake")
set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "/home/autoptr/Proyects/GeometrySurvivor/CMakeFiles/CMakeScratch/TryCompile-qgmivK")
add_executable(cmTC_06466)
target_sources(cmTC_06466 PRIVATE
  "/home/autoptr/Proyects/GeometrySurvivor/CMakeFiles/CMakeScratch/TryCompile-qgmivK/CheckSymbolExists.c"
)
file(GENERATE OUTPUT "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/cmTC_06466_loc"
     CONTENT $<TARGET_FILE:cmTC_06466>)
target_link_libraries(cmTC_06466 ${LINK_LIBRARIES})
